site.unitZh: 清华大学地球系统科学系
site.unitEn: Department of Earth System Science, Tsinghua University
site.taglineZh: 面向全球变化背景下的水循环、水资源与极端水文过程研究
site.taglineEn: Water cycle, water resources, and hydrological extremes under global change

researchThemes.title: Global Water Cycle
researchThemes.summary: Quantifying terrestrial water cycle changes from basin to global scales.

researchThemes.title: Hydrological Extremes
researchThemes.summary: Monitoring and forecasting floods, droughts, flash droughts, and compound risks.

researchThemes.title: Climate Change Impacts
researchThemes.summary: Understanding climate-driven shifts in runoff, evapotranspiration, and soil water.

researchThemes.title: Remote Sensing & Modeling
researchThemes.summary: Integrating satellite observations, land surface models, and data assimilation.
